message:
chore(node): update conformance tests, ambient authority audit artifacts, and lint tooling

Conformance tests:
- fsqlite_inspired_suite: tighten >= threshold assertions to exact ==
  with drift messages for determinism (11), idempotency (10), epoch (13),
  proof (11), total (45), runner (45) fixture counts
- epoch_key_derivation, replica_artifact_determinism: update for new
  domain-separated hash outputs
- bayesian_risk_quarantine, control_channel_replay,
  retention_class_enforcement: adapt to updated API signatures

Ambient authority audit:
- ambient_authority_findings.json: regenerated with 3 new findings
  (eviction_saga AAL-005, policy_checkpoint AAL-006, region_ownership
  AAL-007), updated line numbers for rollout_state.rs callsites
- ambient_authority_allowlist.toml: all 7 exception signatures
  regenerated with new domain-separated hashing prefix
- ambient_authority_gate.rs: updated signature computation

Verification artifacts:
- bd-2g6r, bd-721z: updated evidence and summary for current state

Lint tooling:
- cx_first_policy.rs: minor formatting update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
